basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Korukonda TGT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Korukonda Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sainikschoolkorukonda.org. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Sainik School Korukonda Recruitment 2026 for the TGT (Social Science) post.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Central Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology, Geography OR Honours Graduate, CTET Pass, B.Ed
qualification.details: TGT (Social Science): Graduate with two subjects out of History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology, and Geography OR Honours Graduate with History or Political Science or Geography as the main subject. Pass in CTET. B.Ed in the relevant subject. Desirable: Teaching experience of 2 years, Higher qualifications, Computer knowledge, NCC/Sports achievements.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Korukonda TGT (Social Science) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschoolkorukonda.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the TGT (Social Science) post is 16th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with two subjects from History, Political Science, Economics, Sociology, or Geography, or hold an Honours degree. A CTET pass and B.Ed in the relevant subject are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the TGT (Social Science) post is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the TGT (Social Science) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 52,533/- per month for the TGT (Social Science) post.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the TGT (Social Science) post at Sainik School Korukonda.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the TGT (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 250/-. Other categories' fee details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Korukonda, which is www.sainikschoolkorukonda.org.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of Sainik School Korukonda?
faq.answer: Sainik School Korukonda is located in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 535214.
